description: Mashregh News is a hardline online news outlet widely attributed to IRGC-linked circles. Launched around 2010, it is known for publishing intelligence-style exposés targeting reformists, dissidents, dual nationals, and diaspora activists — effectively functioning as a doxxing and information-warfare platform. Together with [Fars News Agency](/orgs/fars-news-agency) and [Tasnim News Agency](/orgs/tasnim-news-agency), Mashregh forms an [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps)-aligned media triangle.
editorial_notes: IRGC-linked. Known for doxxing dissidents and publishing intelligence-style content.
